title: Prescription Expense Assistance * Medicare Beneficiaries - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Prescription Expense Assistance * Medicare Beneficiaries 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions AIDS/HIV Cancer Medicare Beneficiaries Older Adults Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF UNITED STATES SOCIAL SECURITY ADMINISTRATION EXTRA HELP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance to Medicare Prescription Drug program recipients who have limited resources with prescription costs, including monthly premiums, annual deductibles, and prescription co-payments. Eligibility: -1 person household income limit of $23,475 and resource limit of $17,600 -2 person household income limit of $31,725 and resource limit of $35,130 Resource limits do not count home, one car, burial plot, furniture/ other household and personal items, and up to $1,500 for burial expenses if money has been set aside. Hours: Monday-Friday 4am-4pm (800) 772-1213 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
